use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dialogs
Destructive action confirmations with visual warning states
Secondary action options alongside primary CTAs
Accessibility-compliant interactive elements with focus states
ai_summary: A reusable React button component built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Features 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options with proper focus-visible ring states, hover transitions, and disabled opacity handling for accessibility compliance.
